message:
fix(combinator): stop eagerly polling loser branches in select

When the winning branch of a select is immediately ready, the loser
branch was previously polled once to initialize its drop guard. This
caused ready results on loser branches to be silently dropped, which
swallows panics propagated through futures. The loser is now only
dropped (via its Drop impl) without being polled, matching the
expected cancel-safety contract.

Test assertion updated: loser poll count changes from 1 to 0 when
the winner is left-biased and immediately ready.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
